title: Single Decorative Folk Flat Illustration
sourceTitle: Please Transform Entire Image Into Single Decorative

imagePrompts.prompt:
Please transform the entire image into a single Decorative Folk Flat Illustration with Doodle elements. Use a bold and playful color palette, completely different from the original image.

Simplify all details into clean, flat shapes with a handmade, slightly imperfect feel, as if drawn on a sheet of white paper. The overall style should look cute, childlike, and whimsical.
